entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop (Sorghum bicolor) evaluated for disease resistance and yield.

entities.name: PLANT DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that reduce grain and fodder yields and stover quality in sorghum.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced by the sorghum crop.

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of fodder produced by the sorghum crop.

entities.name: STOVER QUALITY
entities.description: The quality of the stalks and leaves of sorghum after grain harvest.

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY RURAL APPRAISAL
entities.description: A study method used to gather information from rural communities in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the participatory rural appraisal studies were conducted.

entities.name: DECCAN PLATEAU
entities.description: A geographical region in India encompassing Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, and Maharashtra.

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India located on the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India located on the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: MAHARASHTRA
entities.description: A state in India located on the Deccan Plateau.

entities.name: FOLIAR DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting the leaves of the sorghum plant.

entities.name: PANICLE DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases affecting the flowering head or panicle of the sorghum plant.

entities.name: HOST-PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The innate ability of a plant to resist disease attack.

entities.name: MULTIPLE DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist several different diseases simultaneously.

entities.name: RESISTANCE BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A systematic effort to develop crop varieties with improved disease resistance.
